title: Paper from HIGH_PRESSURE_LOW_NOX_EMISSIONS_RESEARCH.pdf
abstract:
In collaboration with U.S. aircraft engine 
companies, NASA Glenn Research Center has 
contributed to the advancement of low emissions 
combustion systems.  For the High Speed Research 
Program (HSR), a 90% reduction in nitrogen oxides 
(NOx) emissions (relative to the then-current state of 
the art) has been demonstrated in sector rig testing at 
General Electric Aircraft Engines (GEAE).  For the 
Advanced Subsonic Technology Program (AST), a 
50% reduction in NOx emissions relative to the 1996
